title: OverGreen
description: Take view of the game under your control.
body:
# OverGreen

OverGreen is Minecraft mod for Fabric that improves control of game's view. It uses Sodium's config API. This mod is not intended to be unfair, it allows to tweak small visual options to provide satisfying gameplay.

### Open Source

Source code of OverGreen is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/FireNameFN/OverGreen).

### Features

- Zooming
- Modifying gamma
- Disabling fog:
  - Overworld fog
  - Nether fog
  - The End fog
  - Water fog
- Customizable permanent HUD
- Hotkey for hiding coordinates from F3 overlay
- Better tooltip for containers like shulker boxes
- Decreasing UI fire when burning

### Gallery

In [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/overgreen/gallery) you can view difference between vanilla Minecraft and customized by this mod.
